sections.heading: Pathway
sections.content: {"pathway_id": "localized_resectable_clinical_n0", "title": "Clinical N0 Disease: Local MCC Only, Surgically Resectable", "branching_basis": ["Surgical resectability", "Sentinel Lymph Node Biopsy (SLNB) result", "Presence of adverse risk factors for local recurrence", "Surgical margin status"], "nodes": [{"criteria": "Surgically resectable local MCC", "options": [{"type": "Surgery", "label": "Primary Excision", "preference": "Recommended", "recommendation": "Excision with 1- to 2-cm margins, or Mohs/peripheral and deep en face margin assessment (PDEMA) in certain circumstances [MCC-2, footnote i, j]. SLNB with appropriate immunopanel should be performed prior to or at the time of definitive excision [MCC-2, footnote h].", "linked_regimen_ids": []}], "adjuvant_logic": {"applies": true, "summary": "Adjuvant treatment is determined by pathology results. Key factors: margin status, SLNB result, and adverse risk factors (LVI, immunosuppression, primary tumor >1 cm, close/positive margins, head/neck site)."}}, {"criteria": "Pathology: Clear margins AND No adverse risk factors", "options": [{"type": "Observation", "label": "Observation", "preference": "Preferred", "recommendation": "Observation is recommended for the primary site and the nodal basin if SLNB is negative [MCC-2].", "linked_regimen_ids": []}], "adjuvant_logic": {"applies": false, "summary": "No adjuvant therapy recommended."}}, {"criteria": "Pathology: Clear margins AND ≥1 adverse risk factors", "options": [{"type": "Radiation Therapy", "label": "Adjuvant RT to Primary Tumor Site", "preference": "Recommended", "recommendation": "Adjuvant RT is recommended [MCC-2, footnote n]. If adjuvant RT is planned, narrower clinical margins are acceptable with the goal of clear or microscopically positive margins [MCC-2, footnote l].", "linked_regimen_ids": []}], "adjuvant_logic": {"applies": true, "summary": "Adjuvant RT recommended due to high risk of local recurrence."}}, {"criteria": "Pathology: Microscopically positive margins", "options": [{"type": "Radiation Therapy", "label": "Adjuvant RT to Primary Tumor Site", "preference": "Preferred", "recommendation": "Adjuvant RT is the preferred additional treatment [MCC-2]. Re-excision may be considered if RT is not feasible or planned.", "linked_regimen_ids": []}], "adjuvant_logic": {"applies": true, "summary": "Adjuvant RT preferred over re-excision."}}, {"criteria": "Pathology: Grossly positive margins and further resection not possible", "options": [{"type": "Radiation Therapy", "label": "Adjuvant RT to Primary Tumor Site", "preference": "Recommended", "recommendation": "Adjuvant RT is recommended [MCC-2, footnote n].", "linked_regimen_ids": []}], "adjuvant_logic": {"applies": true, "summary": "Adjuvant RT recommended."}}, {"criteria": "SLNB Result: Positive", "options": [{"type": "Diagnostic", "label": "Baseline Imaging", "preference": "Recommended", "recommendation": "Baseline imaging via whole-body FDG-PET/CT (preferred) or CT with contrast of chest, abdomen, pelvis, and neck (if head/neck primary) [MCC-2, footnote m]. MRI of the brain if clinical suspicion of brain metastases or direct extension.", "linked_regimen_ids": []}, {"type": "Surgery", "label": "Node Dissection", "preference": "An option", "recommendation": "Therapeutic lymph node dissection (TLND) is an option for the involved nodal basin [MCC-2].", "linked_regimen_ids": []}, {"type": "Radiation Therapy", "label": "Adjuvant RT to Nodal Basin", "preference": "Preferred", "recommendation": "RT to the nodal basin is a preferred option, especially following node dissection with multiple involved nodes and/or extranodal extension (ENE) [MCC-2].", "linked_regimen_ids": []}], "adjuvant_logic": {"applies": true, "summary": "Management of the positive SLN is required, typically with TLND and/or RT to the nodal basin."}}, {"criteria": "SLNB Result: Negative", "options": [{"type": "Observation", "label": "Observation of Nodal Basin", "preference": "Preferred", "recommendation": "Observation is the preferred management [MCC-2].", "linked_regimen_ids": []}, {"type": "Radiation Therapy", "label": "Consider RT to Nodal Basin", "preference": "Consider for select high-risk scenarios", "recommendation": "May consider RT to the nodal basin for certain high-risk clinical scenarios (e.g., compromised SLNB, high risk of false-negative, profound immunosuppression) [MCC-2, footnote p].", "linked_regimen_ids": []}], "adjuvant_logic": {"applies": false, "summary": "Observation standard; RT considered only in specific high-risk situations."}}]}, {"pathway_id": "localized_locally_advanced_clinical_n0", "title": "Clinical N0 Disease: Locally Advanced MCC When Curative Surgery and RT Are Not Feasible", "branching_basis": ["Surgical candidacy", "Response to neoadjuvant immunotherapy"], "nodes": [{"criteria": "Clinical N0, locally advanced MCC, surgical candidate", "options": [{"type": "Systemic Therapy", "label": "Neoadjuvant Nivolumab", "preference": "Consider", "recommendat

flowcharts.title: Clinical N0 Disease: Local MCC Only, Surgically Resectable

edges.label: Clear margins, no adverse risk factors

flowcharts.title: Clinical N0 Disease: Locally Advanced MCC When Curative Surgery and RT Are Not Feasible
